sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: THERMO FISHER SCIENTIFIC INC.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: GAAP 희석 주당순이익은 11% 늘어 4.43달러, 조정 주당순이익은 6% 늘어 5.44달러를 기록했습니다.
분기 중 자사주 30억 달러를 매입하고 배당을 10% 인상하며 주주환원을 확대했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 엔비디아와 전략적 협업을 맺어 AI 역량을 실험·분석 장비에 결합하고, SHL메디컬과 무균 충전·조립 솔루션 협력을 발표했습니다.
엔드포인트 데이터 솔루션 기업 클라리오 인수를 완료해 임상시험 역량을 보강했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출은 110억 1,000만 달러로 6% 성장하며 견조한 외형 확대를 이어갔습니다.
GAAP 주당순이익 4.43달러, 조정 주당순이익 5.44달러로 수익성이 개선됐습니다.

watchItems.text: 엔비디아·SHL메디컬 등과의 협업이 실제 제품·생산성 향상으로 이어지는지가 관전 포인트입니다.
활발한 인수와 자사주 매입이 향후 실적과 현금흐름에 어떻게 기여하는지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q12026earnings8kex99_1.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 News Media Contact Information: Sandy Pound Thermo Fisher Scientific Investor Contact Information: Rafael Tejada Thermo Fisher Scientific Phone: 781-622-1223 Phone: 781-622-1356 E-mail: sandy.pound@thermofisher.com E-mail: rafael.tejada@thermofisher.com Thermo Fisher Scientific Reports First Quarter 2026 Results WALTHAM, Mass. (April 23, 2026) – Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO), the world leader in serving science, today reported its financial results for the first quarter ended March 28, 2026. First Quarter Highlights • First quarter revenue grew 6% to $11.01 billion. • First quarter GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) grew 11% to $4.43. • First quarter adjusted EPS grew 6% to $5.44. • Delivered excellent performance in the first quarter, demonstrating the strength of our proven growth strategy, th  Normalized numeric aliases: $11.01 billion = 110억 1,000만 달러; $11.01 = 11.01달러; $4.43 = 4.43달러; $5.44 = 5.44달러.

em, which increases productivity and reliability in cell therapy manufacturing, supporting scalable production of advanced therapies. • Strengthened our industry-leading commercial engine and deepened our trusted partner status with customers. During the quarter, we announced a strategic collaboration with NVIDIA, combining our leadership in laboratory technologies with NVIDIA’s AI capabilities to advance scientific instrumentation, improve laboratory performance and accelerate scientific breakthroughs. We also announced a strategic collaboration with SHL Medical to deliver fully integrated sterile fill-finish and device assembly solutions, advancing our U.S. drug product manufacturing capabilities and helping pharma and biotech customers accelerate development and commercialization of important medicines. • Continued to successfully execute our capital deployment strategy. During the qu

arter, we completed the acquisition of Clario, an industry-leading provider of endpoint data solutions, repurchased $3.0 billion of stock and increased our dividend by 10%. “We delivered a strong start to the year, reflecting excellent execution by our team, as we leveraged the PPI Business System to drive operational excellence and enable our customers’ success,” said Marc N. Casper, chairman and chief executive officer of Thermo Fisher Scientific. “We continued to make great progress executing our strategy, further strengthening our capabilities with the addition of Clario.” Casper added, “Looking ahead, we are well positioned to deliver a strong year. As the trusted partner to our customers, we are uniquely equipped to help them accelerate their innovation and enhance their productivity. Through our global scale and the power of the PPI Business System, we will continue to actively ma  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.0 billion = 30억 달러; $3.0 = 3.0달러.
